result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on this BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, ranging from layout clipping problems to navigation state inconsistencies.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column are clipped/cut off across both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Game titles like 'Magni Pho...', 'Munc Mi...', and 'Hypero...' are partially visible, indicating a 3-column grid is being forced into a viewport that only fits ~2.5 columns.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid layout to either use 2 full columns on mobile or implement a proper horizontal scroll carousel with visible scroll indicators so all game cards are fully visible or clearly swipeable.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab in the horizontal tab bar is truncated, cutting off the label text mid-word.
issues.suggestion: Implement a horizontally scrollable tab bar with proper overflow handling, or shorten tab labels to fit within the available space without truncation.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar shows 'POKER' as the active/selected tab (highlighted in gold with underline), but the page content displayed is clearly the Casino home page, not a Poker section. This is a misleading active state.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the active state of the bottom navigation tab correctly reflects the currently displayed page content. Set 'CASINO' as the active tab when the casino home page is shown.

issues.description: The 'Hot Ga...' tab label is cut off and unreadable, likely 'Hot Games'. This is both a content readability and layout issue.
issues.suggestion: Abbreviate or truncate with an ellipsis gracefully, or allow the tab bar to scroll horizontally so full labels are readable when tapped/scrolled.
